channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quote of the day by Netscape founder Marc Andreessen: 'We believe any deceleration of AI will cost lives' — a full-throated defense of the AI buildout
item.description: A man who's deeply embedded in the technology ecosystem sees no other way forward than going full speed ahead on the AI buildout

item.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
item.description: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

item.title: Apple calls OpenAI's hardware business 'rotten to its core' in trade secret theft lawsuit
item.description: The lawsuit also names io Products, the hardware company led by Jony Ive.

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
item.description: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that former employees that now work for the AI company have stolen Apple's trade secrets "for the benefit of OpenAI." In its complaint, Apple alleges that it has uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple," and it names IO Products […]

item.title: AMD abandons HBM for inferior LPDDR5x as AI monster devours precious high-bandwidth memory
item.description: AMD is moving away from HBM to LPDDR5x for its SoCs as AI hyperscalers continue to snap up all available wafers of the former.

item.title: Mamdani announces new Click-to-Cancel rule for New York City
item.description: The rule revives a proposed FTC protection that was abandoned last year.

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
item.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.

item.title: ‘Christ almighty, this is so bad’: ChatGPT’s big app update brings huge changes to your workflows — and users seem to hate it
item.description: OpenAI has merged the ChatGPT app with Codex, but many users feel disappointed with the change.

item.title: 57% of enterprises have watched AI agents be confidently wrong. The fix is an agentic context layer, but who has one?
item.description: An enterprise AI agent answers with total confidence, but the number is wrong. Nobody catches it until someone traces it back to a stale metric definition or a document the retrieval system never pulled. The model did not fail. The context it was given did.In the past six months, 57% of enterprises traced a confident but wrong AI agent answer to missing or inconsistent business context, and 31% said it happened more than once, according to a VB Pulse June 2026 survey of 101 qualified enterprises with more than 100 employees.The reason is not hard to find. Retrieval over documents is the defaul...

item.title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
item.description: The iPhone maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.

item.title: Un smartphone, une montre, des écouteurs et un socle : le pack Pixel 10 à prix cassé
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10, flagship photo de Google animé par la puce Tensor G5, est proposé en pack chez Boulanger avec le bracelet Fitbit Air, les écouteurs Pixel Buds 2a et le socle magnétique Pixelsnap. Le tout revient à 549 euros après une offre de remboursement de 100 euros.

item.title: Sous les 400 euros, la Nintendo Switch 2 devient bien plus tentante sur Joybuy
item.description: La Nintendo Switch 2, console hybride de Nintendo sortie en juin 2025, est disponible pour 399 euros sur Joybuy en cochant le coupon sur la page du produit. Une belle occasion de craquer pour la nouvelle génération de la console la plus populaire du moment.

item.title: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work, a cloud-based AI agent that manages tasks across email, Slack and calendars
item.description: OpenAI on Thursday launched ChatGPT Work, a new AI agent embedded inside its flagship chatbot that aims to transform ChatGPT from a question-and-answer tool into an autonomous work platform capable of executing complex, multi-step tasks across users' email, calendars, code repositories, and messaging apps.The product is powered by OpenAI's latest flagship model, GPT-5.6, and is designed to go far beyond generating text. ChatGPT Work can gather context from connected apps, files, and workflows to produce finished documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and websites. The agent takes a s...

item.title: OpenAI's browser isn't dead, it just moved to the ChatGPT app
item.description: Let's be real, OpenAI isn't giving up on the browser market, it is just changing its strategy.
